escalation.rationale: Russia test-fires Satan II ICBM while UAE secretly coordinates attacks on Iran with Israel, escalating multiple fronts simultaneously.

ticker_items: Putin hails test of Satan II intercontinental ballistic missile
UAE secretly coordinating attacks on Iran with Israeli Mossad
Israel escalates Gaza bombing 35% since Iran ceasefire
China's Xi warns Trump about Taiwan at Beijing summit
Latvian PM resigns after Ukrainian drone incidents

new_entrant.text: UAE revealed as secret participant in attacks against Iran, coordinating with Israeli intelligence.

eastern_europe.description: Russian drone attack left nine-month-old baby girl fighting for life with leg blown off.

middle_east.description: Israeli forces conducted brutal bombardment killing at least 87 people since Friday.
US Apache and Seahawk helicopters sank half dozen Iranian small boats while clearing threats.

russia.text: The Sarmat missile is the world's most powerful intercontinental ballistic missile
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: President of Russia

middle_east.text: Tehran's 14-point peace proposal has no alternative for resolving the U.S.-Iran conflict
middle_east.speaker: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf
middle_east.title: Iranian Parliament Speaker

middle_east.text: Progress is being made in talks with Iran
middle_east.speaker: J.D. Vance
middle_east.title: US Vice President

middle_east.text: No help is needed from China to end the Iran war, the US will win the conflict
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Disagreement over Taiwan could send US-China relations down a dangerous path
middle_east.speaker: Xi Jinping
middle_east.title: Chinese President

observers.description: Saudi Arabia revealed to have covertly launched strikes on Iran during the regional war, marking a significant escalation in the kingdom's direct involvement in the conflict against Tehran.
Qatar intensifying regional mediation efforts despite the Iran war bringing airstrikes and cutting off Doha's access to global oil markets, leveraging ties to both US and Iran.
President Trump begins visit to Beijing amid rising tensions, with Trump reportedly weaker and Xi stronger since their last summit, as US seeks to manage multiple global conflicts.

UAE revealed to have secretly coordinated attacks on Iran with Israeli Mossad during Operation Roaring Lion. Intelligence chiefs made multiple secret visits to coordinate military operations against Iranian targets.

North Korean troops marched in Russia's Victory Day parade through Red Square bearing their national flag. Reports suggest Russian ship carrying nuclear submarine reactor components to North Korea mysteriously sank in Mediterranean.

financial.notes: Iran's control over Strait of Hormuz forcing 70% of Red Sea freight traffic to reroute via Cape of Good Hope.

update_log.text: China's Xi warns Trump about Taiwan disagreements during Beijing summit
Latvian Prime Minister resigns after incidents involving stray Ukrainian drones
Reports reveal Mossad chief made secret visits to UAE to coordinate Iran attacks
Putin hails test-firing of Satan II intercontinental ballistic missile
VP Vance claims progress in Iran talks as Trump begins China visit
Saudi Arabia revealed to have launched covert strikes on Iran during regional war
Israeli strikes kill 87 in Lebanon since Friday despite ceasefire
Oil spills detected near Strait of Hormuz from ongoing strikes on Iranian infrastructure
